title: Hypixel Plus
description: A Resource Pack built for the Hypixel server that textures all of SkyBlock, Bedwars, and so much more!
body:
# The LOTUS ATOLL Update is out Now! Hypixel+ is a resource pack for the Hypixel Server that textures all of SkyBlock, Bedwars, and more, with a vanilla style built to fit in with default textures new or old!
Updates are typically released within 1-2 Weeks of a SkyBlock update (depending on scale) # Resource Pack Requirements 0.25.0**c** = **Catharsis** - Requires [Catharsis Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/catharsis?), has all features implemented
0.25.0**v** = **Vanilla** - No mods required, but is missing most player head items because of new limits set by Mojang in 1.21.11 # FAQ **Why are a lot of player head items missing custom textures?**
Use the Catharsis version (denoted by the c in the version number) instead of the Vanilla version to have full texture support

**More FAQ answers can be found on the Discord Server**

**Found a bug, need help with the pack, or want to see what the next update has in store?**
[Join the Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/jdnEJ9HXBV 'Join the Discord Server!') ### Thank you for over 1,300,000 Downloads!! :D Want early access to updates before they go live? [check out my Ko-Fi!](https://ko-fi.com/ic22487 'check out my Ko-Fi!')
